name: Pumpkin Soup with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 small leek (white part only), sliced thin
1/2 fresh jalapeno pepper, seeded and minced
1 1/4 lbs small shrimp, shell-on and deveined, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy skillet, melt butter over moderate heat. Add onion, leek, carrot, garlic, and jalapeno; cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
2. Reduce heat to very low and cook, covered, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender, about 45 minutes.
3. While cooking the vegetables, in a 6-quart heavy pan, bring broth to a boil with allspice and curry powder (skimming any froth). Stir in vegetables, pumpkin, and coconut milk; simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until thickened, about 30 minutes. Discard allspice.
4. In batches, puree the soup using a blender. Return to pan and stir in remaining ingredients and salt to taste. Simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until shrimp are just cooked through, about 5 minutes.
